title: rosa spinosissima var. altaica
intro: Rosa spinosissima var. altaica, also known as the scotch rose or prickly rose, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Siberia and Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa spinosissima var. altaica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
